welcome.title: Welcome to Your Career Insights Session
welcome.intro: Welcome! I'll walk you through your personality profile and career recommendations — starting with who you are professionally, then exploring the career paths that best match your goals and strengths.
welcome.encouragement: Feel free to ask questions, push back, or explore any career further along the way.
welcome.tip: No need to take notes — everything lands in a full report on your dashboard. Responses may take a moment as multiple AI tools work in the background.

errors.noResponse: I didn't receive a response. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The response took too long. Please try again.

session.completed: Session completed — your report is ready above.
